history.en: Modern designer crossbreed developed in recent decades in North America by crossing Basset Hound and Labrador Retriever to combine friendly family-oriented traits with unique appearance and scenting abilities
history.zh: 现代设计型混种犬，近几十年在北美通过巴吉度猎犬与拉布拉多寻回犬杂交培育，旨在结合友善的家庭犬特质与独特外观及嗅觉能力。

overview.en: The Bassador is a delightful designer crossbreed that blends the friendly, outgoing nature of the Labrador Retriever with the loyal, gentle, and intelligent traits of the Basset Hound. This medium-sized dog typically inherits the Basset's long ears, short legs, and soulful expression, combined with the Lab's sturdy build and love for water. Known for being exceptionally good-natured, they are patient with children, affectionate with family, and generally sociable with other pets. Their keen sense of smell, inherited from the Basset Hound, makes them curious explorers who enjoy tracking scents. While they are intelligent and eager to please, they can sometimes display a stubborn streak. Overall, the Bassador is a loving, low-key companion that thrives on human interaction and makes an excellent family dog, offering a perfect balance of playfulness and calmness.
overview.zh: 巴塞特拉布拉多犬是一种令人愉悦的设计师混种犬，融合了拉布拉多寻回犬友善外向的天性与巴吉度猎犬忠诚、温和、聪明的特质。这种中型犬通常继承了巴吉度的长耳朵、短腿和忧郁的表情，同时结合了拉布拉多结实的体格和对水的喜爱。它们以性情极好而闻名，对孩子有耐心，对家人充满感情，通常对其他宠物也很友善。从巴吉度猎犬继承来的敏锐嗅觉使它们成为好奇的探索者，喜欢追踪气味。虽然它们聪明且渴望取悦主人，但有时也会表现出固执的一面。总的来说，巴塞特拉布拉多犬是一种充满爱心、性格温和的伴侣犬，喜欢与人互动，是优秀的家庭犬，在活泼与平静之间达到了完美平衡。

care.en: Daily care for a Bassador requires moderate effort. Their short to medium coat sheds moderately year-round, so brushing two to three times a week with a rubber curry brush or shedding tool helps control loose hair. Bathe every 6-8 weeks or as needed. Pay special attention to their long, floppy ears—clean them weekly with a vet-approved ear cleaner to prevent infections, and dry them thoroughly after swimming or baths. Their drooping eyes may collect debris; wipe gently with a damp cloth. Exercise needs are moderate: a 30-45 minute daily walk plus playtime in a fenced yard is ideal. They enjoy swimming, fetch, and scent games. Be mindful of their short legs and heavy body—avoid overexertion or high jumps to protect joints. Annual vet checkups, dental care, and regular nail trimming (every 3-4 weeks) are essential. Keep vaccinations and parasite prevention up to date.
care.zh: 巴塞特拉布拉多犬的日常护理需要中等程度的投入。它们的短至中等长度被毛全年适度掉毛，每周用橡胶梳或去毛工具刷毛两到三次有助于控制脱落的毛发。每6到8周或根据需要洗澡一次。要特别关注它们长而下垂的耳朵——每周用兽医认可的洗耳液清洁一次，防止感染，游泳或洗澡后务必彻底擦干。它们下垂的眼睛可能积聚杂物，用湿布轻轻擦拭即可。运动需求适中：每天30到45分钟的散步加上在有围栏的院子里玩耍是理想的。它们喜欢游泳、捡球和气味游戏。注意它们腿短身重的特点——避免过度劳累或跳跃过高以保护关节。每年体检、牙齿护理和定期修剪指甲（每3到4周一次）是必要的。保持疫苗接种和寄生虫预防措施的最新状态。

training.en: Training a Bassador requires patience, consistency, and positive reinforcement. This breed is intelligent but can be independent-minded, especially when following a scent. Start training early with basic obedience commands like sit, stay, come, and loose-leash walking. Use high-value treats, praise, and play as rewards—they respond best to food motivation. Keep sessions short (10-15 minutes) to maintain focus. Socialization is crucial: expose your Bassador to various people, dogs, environments, and sounds from puppyhood to prevent shyness or stubbornness. Crate training is recommended for housebreaking and providing a safe den. Because of their strong prey drive and scent obsession, practice reliable recall in a secure area before off-leash adventures. Avoid harsh corrections—they can become stubborn or shut down. Scent work and nose games are excellent mental stimulation that channels their natural abilities positively.
training.zh: 训练巴塞特拉布拉多犬需要耐心、一致性和正向强化。这个品种很聪明，但有时会独立思考，尤其是在追踪气味时。尽早开始基本服从训练，如坐下、等待、过来和松绳随行。使用高价值零食、表扬和玩耍作为奖励——它们对食物激励反应最佳。保持训练时间短（10到15分钟）以维持注意力。社会化至关重要：从小让巴塞特拉布拉多犬接触不同的人、狗、环境和声音，以防止害羞或固执。建议进行笼内训练，有助于定点如厕并提供安全的巢穴。由于它们有强烈的猎物本能和气味痴迷，在安全区域练习可靠的召回后再进行无绳冒险。避免严厉的纠正——它们可能变得固执或退缩。气味工作和鼻子游戏是极好的精神刺激，能积极引导它们的自然能力。

diet.en: Feed your Bassador a high-quality, balanced diet appropriate for their age, size, and activity level. Because both parent breeds are prone to obesity, portion control is critical. Measure meals using a standard measuring cup and avoid free-feeding. A typical adult Bassador weighing 50-70 pounds may need 2-3 cups of premium dry kibble per day, divided into two meals. Look for foods with real meat as the first ingredient, healthy fats, and limited fillers. Joint-supporting nutrients like glucosamine and chondroitin are beneficial due to their heavy body structure. Avoid foods high in grains or artificial additives. Treats should not exceed 10% of daily calories—use healthy options like carrot sticks, green beans, or small training treats. Fresh water must always be available. Consult your veterinarian for specific recommendations, especially if your dog has allergies, sensitivities, or weight management needs. Puppies require three to four smaller meals daily until six months old.
diet.zh: 为你的巴塞特拉布拉多犬提供适合其年龄、体型和活动水平的高质量均衡饮食。由于两个亲本品种都容易肥胖，控制食量至关重要。使用标准量杯测量食物，避免随意喂食。一只典型的成年巴塞特拉布拉多犬体重在50到70磅之间，每天可能需要2到3杯优质干粮，分两餐喂食。选择以真实肉类为第一成分、含有健康脂肪且填充物有限的狗粮。由于它们身体结构较重，含有葡萄糖胺和软骨素等关节支持营养素的狗粮是有益的。避免高谷物或人工添加剂的食物。零食不应超过每日卡路里的10%——选择胡萝卜条、青豆或小训练零食等健康选项。必须始终提供新鲜饮水。请咨询兽医以获得具体建议，特别是如果你的狗有过敏、敏感或体重管理需求。幼犬在六个月大之前每天需要三到四顿小餐。

livingTips.en: The Bassador adapts well to various living situations, including apartments, provided they receive adequate daily exercise. A securely fenced yard is ideal for their exploratory nature, as they may wander off following a scent. They are generally quiet dogs but may bark to alert or when excited. Their short legs and long back make them better suited for homes without many stairs; use ramps for furniture if they enjoy being on couches. They thrive in households with children, being patient and gentle, but supervision with toddlers is always wise due to their size. They usually get along well with other dogs and cats, especially when raised together. However, their strong prey drive may cause them to chase small pets like rabbits or hamsters. Bassadors are social creatures and should not be left alone for long periods—they can develop separation anxiety. Provide interactive toys, puzzle feeders, and a comfortable bed. Climate-wise, they tolerate moderate weather but are sensitive to extreme heat due to their heavy bodies and short noses.
livingTips.zh: 巴塞特拉布拉多犬能很好地适应各种生活环境，包括公寓，前提是它们得到足够的日常锻炼。有安全围栏的院子非常适合它们爱探索的天性，因为它们可能会跟随气味走失。它们通常是安静的狗，但可能会在警觉或兴奋时吠叫。它们的短腿和长背使它们更适合没有太多楼梯的家庭；如果它们喜欢上沙发，可以使用坡道。它们在有孩子的家庭中表现出色，耐心而温和，但由于体型较大，与幼儿相处时始终建议监督。它们通常与其他狗和猫相处融洽，尤其是一起长大的情况下。然而，它们强烈的猎物本能可能导致追逐兔子或仓鼠等小宠物。巴塞特拉布拉多犬是社交型动物，不应长时间独处——它们可能产生分离焦虑。提供互动玩具、益智喂食器和舒适的床。气候方面，它们能适应温和天气，但由于身体较重和鼻子较短，对极端高温敏感。
